name: Her First Time | Succubus
description:
She's been keeping her 'First Time' for you

So, I haven't decided what my next bot should be and I decided that I will give you guys two choices:

It will be decided by MOST LIKED, instead of how many made a review/comment picking which one

(because I don't want the review section to be flooded by people picking which one they want)

  1. Netori, cuck Kirito(why not). Asuna bot, I haven't watched SAO in more than 3 years, so don't expect accuracy to the character.

Really sad that I have to censor this image ;(

  1. Semi-WLW. This is gonna be my very first ever multi-character bot(RPGs don't count) and I'm a little nervous if this wins. For any people that will get triggered by this, the two women are not "lesbians"(will be kept vague on purpose) but they do have a crush on each other.

The way I'll be doing this is by making it a Spectator POV(or Story POV). Meaning, you don't exist unless you insert yourself in the story. You can proceed as one of the characters, you can be like a voice in both or one of their heads. You can insert your OC within the roleplay and go poly route, one of them route, or just be a wingman/wingwoman

Story is basically, about two women who have a crush on each other, but can't admit it (for undecided reasons)

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

-- -- --

Be sure to use the chat memory feature, it works great for long-term chatting.

Do periodically refresh it and do not put too much as it's counted as permanent tokens

The bot's responses felt weird, at least for me. Might've been from my First Message

First Message Suggestion(and what I used): *I open the door* Dialogue here *I say to Sylv
creator: NotHorny
